metadata.title: Awesome Nano Banana Pro Prompts - Integration
metadata.description: Featured prompts from YouMind's Awesome Nano Banana Pro collection integrated into Nano Banana Edit

featured_prompts.title: Wide Quote Card with Portrait
featured_prompts.author: Nicolechan
featured_prompts.description: A prompt for generating a wide quote card featuring a famous person's portrait, with a brown background, light-gold serif quote text, and layout where text occupies two-thirds and the person one-third. The quote text and author are parameterized for reuse.

featured_prompts.title: Premium Liquid Glass Bento Grid Product Infographic with 8 Modules
featured_prompts.author: Mansi Sanghani
featured_prompts.description: Create an Infographics with bento grid 8 module layout, user can specify any product name in Food, Medicine, tech etc category, choose language, Background style, Hero grid style

featured_prompts.title: Hand-Drawn Style Header Image
featured_prompts.author: セミナー講師専門AIコンシェルジュ｜工藤 晶
featured_prompts.description: Prompt for a hand-drawn style header image of a person introducing Nano Banana Pro

featured_prompts.title: Watercolor Map of Germany with Labeled States
featured_prompts.author: Florian Gallwitz
featured_prompts.description: A German prompt to generate a watercolor-style map of Germany where all federal states are labeled in ballpoint pen, useful for educational or infographic-style maps.

featured_prompts.title: New Year's Day Special: Four-Panel Puzzle for 2026 Blessing
featured_prompts.author: 松果先森
featured_prompts.description: A detailed multi-panel prompt for Nano Banana Pro, creating a 2x2 grid photo collage where a single female character, in four different outfits and settings, pieces together a puzzle that spells '2026 New Year's Day Happy' in the center.

featured_prompts.title: Vintage Patent Document for an Invention
featured_prompts.author: Alexandra Aisling
featured_prompts.description: A prompt designed to generate an image of a vintage United States patent document from the late 1800s. It specifies details like precise technical drawings, handwritten annotations, aged paper texture, foxing stains, an embossed seal, and a wax stamp, making it ideal for historical or archival aesthetics.

featured_prompts.title: Chalkboard-Style AI News Summary
featured_prompts.author: ひでもん | AI開発@ニュース発信
featured_prompts.description: A Japanese prompt for turning AI news content into a hand-drawn, teacher-style chalkboard diagram with explanations.

featured_prompts.title: Detailed Mirror-Selfie Otaku Room Scene
featured_prompts.author: 宝玉
featured_prompts.description: A very detailed Nano Banana prompt describing a female mirror selfie in a blue-toned otaku computer corner, with full specifications for character, environment, lighting, camera, and negative prompts.

featured_prompts.title: Edo-period Ukiyo-e Modern Scene Reinterpretation
featured_prompts.author: VoxcatAI
featured_prompts.description: A Japanese Edo-period Ukiyo-e woodblock print style prompt, reimagining modern technology through an ancient lens as a surreal collaboration between masters.
